message.reasoning:
We need to produce JSON only with shape containing kind, assistant_message, tool_call (if tool_call), acquired_fact_ids, readiness_state.

We are in "prepare_to_edit" objective: need exact evidence before editing schema definitions so artifacts stay versioned. We have gathered several schema version constants by hydrating them. Likely we need to collapse the frontier focus symbol S3 (CONTEXT_WINDOW_SECTION_SCHEMA_VERSION) as per recommended action. That would be a session.collapse call.

We must return JSON only. The kind should be "tool_call" because we need to perform a tool call. The tool_name must be exactly one registered tool name. The recommended action is collapse [S3] priority=6 candidates=1 :: Collapse symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs::CONTEXT_WINDOW_SECTION_SCHEMA_VERSION from working set. So we call session.collapse with target selector for that symbol.

We need to include payload: target selector is likely "symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs::CONTEXT_WINDOW_SECTION_SCHEMA_VERSION". Should we include include_descendants? Not required. Use default (none). So payload can be {"target":"symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs::CONTEXT_WINDOW_SECTION_SCHEMA_VERSION"}.

We also need acquired_fact_ids: list of fact ids we have acquired? The summary shows we have hydrated source for CONTEXT_WINDOW_SECTION_SCHEMA_VERSION (short id S3). So we can include ["S3"] maybe. Or maybe also other schema version ids like TASK_SPEC_SCHEMA_VERSION etc. But the instruction: "acquired_fact_ids":["<fact id>"]. Probably we should include the fact ids we have just acquired in this step. The frontier action suggests collapse S3. So we likely have acquired fact S3 earlier; we can include it.

Readiness_state: after collapsing, we may be ready to edit? The state likely "ready_to_edit" because we have evidence and have collapsed. So readiness_state: "ready_to_edit".

Assistant_message: brief status, maybe "Collapsing CONTEXT_WINDOW_SECTION_SCHEMA_VERSION". Must be brief.

No tool_call inside JSON besides tool_call field. So produce:

{
  "kind":"tool_call",
  "assistant_message":"Collapsing CONTEXT_WINDOW_SECTION_SCHEMA_VERSION",
  "tool_call":{"tool_name":"session.collapse","payload":{"target":"symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs::CONTEXT_WINDOW_SECTION_SCHEMA_VERSION"}},
  "acquired_fact_ids":["S3"],
  "readiness_state":"ready_to_edit"
}

Check JSON validity: no trailing commas. Ensure proper quoting. The tool_name must exactly match registered name: "session.collapse". Yes.

Make sure no extra fields. The shape: {{"kind":"think|tool_call|complete","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{{"tool_name":"<one registered tool name>","payload":{{}}}},"acquired_fact_ids":["<fact id>"],"readiness_state":"not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit"}}. So we need tool_call as an object with tool_name and payload. Good.

Thus output exactly that JSON.
